details.productUrlName: Gimli Mournful Avenger Showcase Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
Gimli, Mournful Avenger has indestructible as long as two or more creatures died under your control this turn.
Whenever another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Gimli. When this ability resolves for the third time this turn, Gimli fights up to one target creature you don't control.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
